comments: AxeGuard is intentionally not a compliance certification tool. It reports automated axe-core findings only and states that automated checks cover a subset of WCAG. Results are informational and meant to support, not replace, manual accessibility review.
features: Free online WCAG accessibility scanner. Paste a public URL, AxeGuard loads it in Playwright, runs axe-core, and reports machine-checkable issues grouped by WCAG rule with affected elements and fix guidance.
title: AxeGuard
